name: the-gales-of-november
description: John U. Bacon's 'The Gales of November: The Untold Story of the Edmund Fitzgerald' — the definitive account of the Fitzgerald's final voyage and the enduring mystery of why the 'Big Fitz' sank on Lake Superior.
useCase: Understand the Edmund Fitzgerald tragedy, the competing theories of its sinking, the human stories of the crew, and the legacy of the most famous Great Lakes shipwreck.
knownRisks: No definitive conclusion about the cause of sinking — the book presents multiple theories
Some details may be disturbing to readers who have experienced maritime loss
The Fitzgerald's story is often romanticized — Bacon's account is factual and respectful
